---
title: "Bureau"
body-classes: bureau
---

:::: {.column-screen}

# Qui sommes-nous ?

::: {.bureau-grid}

```{r}
#| output: asis
source(here::here("_resources/helpers.R"))

yaml12::read_yaml(here::here("_resources", "bureau.yml"))$bureau |>
  purrr::map_chr(~ bureau_card(.$photo, .$nom, .$fonction, .$desc)) |>
  cat(sep = "\n\n")
```

:::

::: {.page-content}

::: {.column width="40%"}
# Maison Régionale de la Recherche Clinique, CHU de Lille
<iframe 
  src="{{< var links.map >}}" 
  title="Carte de localisation du bureau de l'ALiSP"
  width="100%"
  height="600"
  sandbox="allow-scripts"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
:::

::: {.column width="60%" class="embed-container"}
::: callout-important
# attente autorisation trombi
:::
<iframe src="{{< var docs.trombi >}}"></iframe>
:::

:::

::::
